mapper.select: SELECT id, name, db_type, host, port, `database` AS database_name, username, password, group_name, create_time, update_time FROM data_source WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_source (name, db_type, host, port, `database`, username, password, group_name, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{dbType}, #{host}, #{port}, #{database}, #{username}, #{password}, #{groupName}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT db_type as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM data_source GROUP BY db_type
SELECT DISTINCT group_name FROM data_source WHERE group_name IS NOT NULL AND group_name != '' ORDER BY group_name
